info.title: React CMS API
info.description: OpenAPI documentation for the React CMS backend.

post.summary: Login and create a Sanctum token

put.description: Uploads logo and favicon as base64 data URL strings, for example data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgo...

get.description: Returns a plain array of users. Pagination metadata is not returned by the current API.

email: The email has already been taken.
password: The password field must be at least 6 characters.
role_id: The selected role id is invalid.

put.description: Editable fields: name, email, password, and role_id. Password may be omitted when it should not be changed.

role_name: The role name has already been taken.
The role name has already been taken.

get.description: Recursive menu tree used by the dynamic sidebar and menu setup screens.
Recursive checked menu tree used by the dynamic sidebar permission system.

comp_logo.description: Logo image as a base64 data URL.

fav_icon.description: Favicon image as a base64 data URL.

comp_logo.description: Logo image as a base64 data URL. Example format: data:image/png;base64,{base64}.

fav_icon.description: Favicon image as a base64 data URL. Example format: data:image/png;base64,{base64}.

bearerAuth.description: Use the token from /login as: Bearer {token}
